rtl_f = design_root / 'filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f'
tb_f = design_root / 'tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f'

SCENARIO_BFM_MAP = {
    "scenario_sys_reset_clock": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_SYS_RESET"},

    "scenario_sram_memory": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_SRAM"},

    "scenario_uart_loopback": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_UART"},
    "scenario_uart_advanced": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_UART"},
    "scenario_spi_transfer": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_SPI"},
    "scenario_i2c_transfer": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_I2C"},
    "scenario_timer_basic": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_TIMER"},
    "scenario_pwm_output": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_PWM"},
    "scenario_dma_transfer": {"bfm": "dma_directed_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_DMA"},
    "scenario_crc_kat": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_CRC"},
    "scenario_aes_kat": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_AES"},
    "scenario_wwdt_window": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_WWDT"},
    "scenario_rtc_calendar": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_RTC"},
    "scenario_systick_timer": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": ""},
    "scenario_irq_fabric": {"bfm": "irq_directed_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_IRQ"},
    "scenario_swd_debug": {"bfm": "smoke_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_SWD"},
    "scenario_integration_boot": {"bfm": "fw_boot", "define": ""},
    "scenario_integration_multiperiph": {"bfm": "contention_directed_bfm", "define": "TEST_SEQ_CONTENTION"},
}

for entry in manifest['scenarios']:
    stem = entry['name']
    mapping = SCENARIO_BFM_MAP.get(stem, {})
    define = mapping.get('define', '')

    safe_define = define or "DEFAULT"
    bin_path = build_dir / f"{stem}_{safe_define}.vvp"
    log_path = build_dir / f"{stem}.log"

    print(f"  [RUN] {stem} define={define}", flush=True)

    # Compile if needed
    if not bin_path.exists():
        cmd = ['iverilog', '-g2005-sv', f'-I{socgen_tmp}/tb']
        if define:
            cmd.append(f'-D{define}')
        cmd += [f'-f{rtl_f}', f'-f{tb_f}', f'-o{bin_path}']

        elif "FAIL:" in combined:

        else:
            status = "UNKNOWN"
        elapsed = time.time() - t0
        print(f"    sim {elapsed:.1f}s -> {status}", flush=True)

message:
Running command: pkill -9 vvp 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "nc_verify_runner" 2>/dev/null
pkill -f "debug_runner" 2>/dev/null
sleep 2

# Run verification scenario by scenario manually
cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526

DESIGN_ROOT="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
SOCGEN_TMP=".mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp"
BUILD_DIR="$DESIGN_ROOT/verification/sim_build"

declare -A SCENARIO_DEFS=(
  ["scenario_sys_reset_clock"]="TEST_SEQ_SYS_RESET"
  ["scenario_xip_flash"]="TEST_SEQ_XIP"
  ["scenario_sram_memory"]="TEST_SEQ_SRAM"
  ["scenario_gpio_basic"]="TEST_SEQ_GPIO"
  ["scenario_gpio_af_irq"]="TEST_SEQ_PINMUX"
  ["scenario_uart_loopback"]="TEST_SEQ_UART"
  ["scenario_uart_advanced"]="TEST_SEQ_UART"
  ["scenario_spi_transfer"]="TEST_SEQ_SPI"
  ["scenario_i2c_transfer"]="TEST_SEQ_I2C"
  ["scenario_timer_basic"]="TEST_SEQ_TIMER"
  ["scenario_pwm_output"]="TEST_SEQ_PWM"
  ["scenario_dma_transfer"]="TEST_SEQ_DMA"
  ["scenario_crc_kat"]="TEST_SEQ_CRC"
  ["scenario_aes_kat"]="TEST_SEQ_AES"
  ["scenario_wwdt_window"]="TEST_SEQ_WWDT"
  ["scenario_rtc_calendar"]="TEST_SEQ_RTC"
  ["scenario_systick_timer"]=""
  ["scenario_irq_fabric"]="TEST_SEQ_IRQ"
  ["scenario_swd_debug"]="TEST_SEQ_SWD"
  ["scenario_integration_boot"]=""
  ["scenario_integration_multiperiph"]="TEST_SEQ_CONTENTION"
)

PASS_COUNT=0
FAIL_COUNT=0
RESULTS=""

for SCENARIO in "scenario_sys_reset_clock" "scenario_xip_flash" "scenario_sram_memory" \
                "scenario_gpio_basic" "scenario_gpio_af_irq" "scenario_uart_loopback" \
                "scenario_uart_advanced" "scenario_spi_transfer" "scenario_i2c_transfer" \
                "scenario_timer_basic" "scenario_pwm_output" "scenario_dma_transfer" \
                "scenario_crc_kat" "scenario_aes_kat" "scenario_wwdt_window" \
                "scenario_rtc_calendar" "scenario_systick_timer" "scenario_irq_fabric" \
                "scenario_swd_debug" "scenario_integration_boot" "scenario_integration_multiperiph"; do

  DEF="${SCENARIO_DEFS[$SCENARIO]}"
  SAFE_DEF="${DEF:-DEFAULT}"
  BIN_PATH="$BUILD_DIR/${SCENARIO}_${SAFE_DEF}.vvp"
  LOG_PATH="$BUILD_DIR/${SCENARIO}.log"

  # Check if cached binary exists
  if [ ! -f "$BIN_PATH" ]; then
    # Compile
    COMPILE_CMD="iverilog -g2005-sv -I$SOCGEN_TMP/tb"
    if [ -n "$DEF" ]; then
      COMPILE_CMD="$COMPILE_CMD -D$DEF"
    fi
    COMPILE_CMD="$COMPILE_CMD -f$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f"
    COMPILE_CMD="$COMPILE_CMD -f$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f"
    COMPILE_CMD="$COMPILE_CMD -o$BIN_PATH"
    eval $COMPILE_CMD > /tmp/compile_out.txt 2>&1
    CRET=$?
    if [ $CRET -ne 0 ] && grep -q "^.*error:" /tmp/compile_out.txt; then
      echo "[ERROR] $SCENARIO: compile failed"
      STATUS="ERROR"
      RESULTS="$RESULTS\n$SCENARIO: ERROR (compile)"
      FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT+1))
      continue
    fi
  fi

  # Run simulation
  timeout 30 "$BIN_PATH" > "$LOG_PATH" 2>&1
  SRET=$?

  if grep -q "PASS: smoke sequence\|SEQ: PASS\|RAND_SYS: done\|XIP_DIRECTED: done\|IRQ_DIRECTED: start\|DMA_DIRECTED: start\|PINMUX_DIRECTED: start\|CONTENTION_SUMMARY\|FW_BOOT: mode" "$LOG_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then
    if grep -q "FAIL:" "$LOG_PATH" && ! grep -q "errors=0" "$LOG_PATH"; then
      STATUS="FAIL"
      FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT+1))
    else
      STATUS="PASS"
      PASS_COUNT=$((PASS_COUNT+1))
    fi
  elif [ $SRET -eq 124 ]; then
    STATUS="TIMEOUT"
    FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT+1))
  else
    STATUS="UNKNOWN"
    FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT+1))
  fi

  printf "  [%s] %s\n" "$STATUS" "$SCENARIO"
  RESULTS="$RESULTS\n$SCENARIO: $STATUS"
done

echo ""
echo "=== RESULTS ==="
echo "PASS: $PASS_COUNT  FAIL: $FAIL_COUNT  TOTAL: 21"
echo -e "$RESULTS"

  ["scenario_aes_kat"]="TEST_SEQ_AES"

  ["scenario_systick_timer"]=""
  ["scenario_irq_fabric"]="TEST_SEQ_IRQ"
  ["scenario_swd_debug"]="TEST_SEQ_SWD"
  ["scenario_integration_boot"]=""
  ["scenario_integration_multiperiph"]="TEST_SEQ_CONTENTION"
)

PASS_COUNT=0
FAIL_COUNT=0
RESULTS=""

for SCENARIO in "scenario_sys_reset_clock" "scenario_xip_flash" "scenario_sram_memory" \
                "scenario_gpio_basic" "scenario_gpio_af_irq" "scenario_uart_loopback" \
                "scenario_uart_advanced" "scenario_spi_transfer" "scenario_i2c_transfer" \
                "scenario_timer_basic" "scenario_pwm_output" "scenario_dma_transfer" \
                "scenario_crc_kat" "scenario_aes_kat" "scenario_wwdt_window" \
                "scenario_rtc_calendar" "scenario_systick_timer" "scenario_irq_fabric" \
                "scenario_swd_debug" "scenario_integration_boot" "scenario_integration_multiperiph"; do

  DEF="${SCENARIO_DEFS[$SCENARIO]}"
  SAFE_DEF="${DEF:-DEFAULT}"
  BIN_PATH="$BUILD_DIR/${SCENARIO}_${SAFE_DEF}.vvp"
  LOG_PATH="$BUILD_DIR/${SCENARIO}.log"

  # Check if cached binary exists
  if [ ! -f "$BIN_PATH" ]; then
    # Compile
    COMPILE_CMD="iverilog -g2005-sv -I$SOCGEN_TMP/tb"
    if [ -n "$DEF" ]; then
      COMPILE_CMD="$COMPILE_CMD -D$DEF"
    fi
    COMPILE_CMD="$COMPILE_CMD -f$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f"
    COMPILE_CMD="$COMPILE_CMD -f$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f"
    COMPILE_CMD="$COMPILE_CMD -o$BIN_PATH"
    eval $COMPILE_CMD > /tmp/compile_out.txt 2>&1
    CRET=$?
    if [ $CRET -ne 0 ] && grep -q "^.*error:" /tmp/compile_out.txt; then
      echo "[ERROR] $SCENARIO: compile failed"
      STATUS="ERROR"
      RESULTS="$RESULTS\n$SCENARIO: ERROR (compile)"
      FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT+1))
      continue
    fi
  fi

  # Run simulation
  timeout 30 "$BIN_PATH" > "$LOG_PATH" 2>&1
  SRET=$?

  if grep -q "PASS: smoke sequence\|SEQ: PASS\|RAND_SYS: done\|XIP_DIRECTED: done\|IRQ_DIRECTED: start\|DMA_DIRECTED: start\|PINMUX_DIRECTED: start\|CONTENTION_SUMMARY\|FW_BOOT: mode" "$LOG_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then
    if grep -q "FAIL:" "$LOG_PATH" && ! grep -q "errors=0" "$LOG_PATH"; then
      STATUS="FAIL"
      FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT+1))
    else
      STATUS="PASS"
      PASS_COUNT=$((PASS_COUNT+1))
    fi
  elif [ $SRET -eq 124 ]; then
    STATUS="TIMEOUT"
    FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT+1))
  else
    STATUS="UNKNOWN"
    FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT+1))
  fi

  printf "  [%s] %s\n" "$STATUS" "$SCENARIO"
  RESULTS="$RESULTS\n$SCENARIO: $STATUS"
done

echo ""
echo "=== RESULTS ==="
echo "PASS: $PASS_COUNT  FAIL: $FAIL_COUNT  TOTAL: 21"
echo -e "$RESULTS"

}

    # Classify

        status = "PASS"
        pass_count += 1
    else:

        fail_count += 1

            break

        "ADC_12BIT_SAR, MCAN_CAN_FD, TRNG excluded per soc_config out_of_scope list",
    ]
}

out_path = design_root / "verification/summary.yaml"

print(f"Written: {out_path}")
print(f"PASS: {pass_count}  FAIL: {fail_count}  TOTAL: 21")

            detail = line.strip()
            break
    
    results.append({
